allow: PowerShell($path = "E:\\leo\\tucucompras\\db\\informe_bd_tucucom.docx"; $tmp = "$env:TEMP\\informe_extract"; if \(Test-Path $tmp\) { Remove-Item $tmp -Recurse -Force }; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::ExtractToDirectory\($path, $tmp\); $xml = Get-Content "$tmp\\word\\document.xml" -Raw; $xml -replace '<[^>]+>', "`n" | Out-String | ForEach-Object { \($_ -split "`n" | Where-Object { $_.Trim\(\) -ne "" }\) -join "`n" })
